summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend regression for the 3 ship-and-redeploy features: (1) Slack/Discord perf-alert webhook endpoints, (2) admin squads-rpc endpoint feeding the SDK Verifier, (3) Vault Deposit QR modal + Squads SDK Compatibility Verifier. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests PASS. Frontend: All requested testids and flows verified — QR modal opens correctly with mainnet badge/warning, api.qrserver.com image, ud2btD6BPdif... address, Squads deep-link to /home; SDK Verifier returns YELLOW verdict (as expected because the squad address is owned by System Program, not Squads V4) with 4 check items including 'V4 program ownership' (failed, detail mentions 'not Squads V4') and 'Multisig PDA lookup' guidance. Backend startup log confirms both '[perf-alert] disabled (set PERF_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL to enable)' and 'Performance webhook alert loop started' print on boot.

integration_issues.issue: [data-testid="token-roadmap"] returned MISSING on / after navigation. Could be a routing/SSR timing issue (DOM may load lazily) or the testid was renamed/removed — needs main-agent verification. Previous iteration confirmed it as PRESENT, so flagging as a possible regression.

testid_gaps.issue: Card renders correctly (visible in screenshot as 'FIRST MAINNET SIGN · REHEARSAL CHECKLIST') but the requested testid 'mainnet-sign-rehearsal' is not present on the root element. Order verification had to fall back to visual confirmation.
Renders correctly ('HARDWARE SIGNER' card visible) but testid 'hardware-signer-card' missing on root.
Component name in review request was 'perf-sparkline' but no element matches that testid. Card itself is rendered via TreasuryPanel.

console_warnings.message: TypeError: e is not a function in la.initialize (bundle.js:775284)
console_warnings.impact: Pre-existing, non-blocking — same warning logged in previous iterations. NOT a regression from this session.

action_items: Verify [data-testid="token-roadmap"] still renders on /. Could be a lazy-mount race; if confirmed missing, restore the testid or its parent component.
Optional: add data-testid='mainnet-sign-rehearsal' / 'hardware-signer-card' / 'perf-sparkline' to those component roots so future regressions can verify card ordering programmatically.
critical_code_review_comments: perf_alert.py: clean — feature is fully off when PERF_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL unset (loop logs 'disabled' and exits; admin POST returns 503). Slack+Discord dual-payload (text/content) is a nice cross-platform touch. Per-route _LAST_ALERT_AT cooldown prevents spam. No hardcoded URLs.

treasury.py /admin/treasury/squads-rpc: properly admin-gated via verify_admin_cookie, raises 503 if no env, never leaks RPC URL on the public surface. Confirmed via negative test that public-status does NOT contain 'rpc_url'.

VaultDepositQRModal.tsx: api.qrserver.com is a public free QR generator with no API key — acceptable since the squad address is public on-chain. Modal correctly differentiates mainnet (rose) vs other (amber) network badges and shows mainnet warning block only when is_mainnet=true.

SquadsSDKVerifier.tsx: pure read-only diagnostic, fetches RPC URL server-side via /api/admin/treasury/squads-rpc with credentials:'include', falls back to public mainnet-beta endpoint on failure. Correctly produces YELLOW verdict for system-program-owned address with operator-action hint to copy 'Multisig Address' from Squads UI settings. NEVER submits a tx — confirmed by reading the file end-to-end.
lifespan.py: _start_perf_alerts() correctly added after _start_solvency_broadcaster. Wrapped in _kick_off so a failing import never tanks startup. Matches the pattern of every other scheduler.
No hardcoded URLs/keys found in any new files — all RPC URLs come from env via backend, QR uses public qrserver.com, deep-links use the Squads-canonical app.squads.so domain.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — all explicitly-requested features verified except the token-roadmap regression flag on /

test_credentials: Admin: GlobalVibez_Founder_2025! (no 2FA needed in UI; backend accepts any 6-digit code = '000000' for API tests).
seed_data_creation: None — all reads against live Helius mainnet RPC + the real squad/vault PDA.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_iter_jan_2026_perf_alert_qr_sdk.py for future regression — covers perf-alert (status 401/200, test 401/503), squads-rpc (401/200/leak-check), public-status, admin squads-status, dashboard, sweep-balance, sweep-instructions, perf-snapshot. NOTE: sweep endpoints live under /api/admin/solana-indexer/, NOT /api/admin/treasury/. Vault-auth body keys are {password, code}. SDK Verifier verdict for current squad ud2btD6BPdif... is EXPECTED to be YELLOW (squad is System-Program-owned, not Squads V4) — this is a feature, not a bug. The QR modal is gated on status.squad_address truthiness; mainnet badge/warning only renders when is_mainnet=true.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Only a token-roadmap testid presence flag on / and 3 missing-but-non-functional testids on Treasury sub-cards.
